name: Check Into Cash
description_short: Gladstone, MO's Check Into Cash location at 5720 N Antioch Rd offers quick payday loans and title loans with convenient hours and same-day service.
description_long:
Check Into Cash in Gladstone, MO is located at 5720 N Antioch Rd, a standalone storefront serving the Gladstone area with accessible parking and convenient access. The location is open Monday through Friday with extended hours on Mondays and Fridays (9AM-7PM), shorter hours Tuesday through Thursday (9AM-6PM), and Saturday service from 9AM-4PM. This Gladstone branch is closed Sundays.

At this Gladstone location, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and other short-term credit options. The friendly staff can help you understand your options and process applications quickly. For questions or to learn more about available services, call the storefront directly at 816-454-2590.

If you're facing unexpected expenses or need quick cash in Gladstone, MO, Check Into Cash provides a straightforward lending solution. Bring your ID, proof of income, and banking information to apply. The team works to process loans on the same day, helping Gladstone residents get the funds they need when they need them.
pros: Payday loans available both in-store and online, giving flexibility in how you apply
30+ years in business with a Michigan state lending license posted publicly
Same-day cash disbursement for approved in-store applicants
Multiple financial services in one location: loans, check cashing, Western Union, bill pay, and Green Dot cards
Straightforward eligibility — approval based on income verification and active checking account, not credit score
Extended weekday hours (8am–7pm Friday) and Saturday availability for working borrowers
Offers multiple loan types — payday, installment, title, and flex line of credit — to match different borrowing needs
cons: Payday loans carry triple-digit APRs typical of the industry — cost is very high relative to the amount borrowed
Michigan payday loan cap is $600, which may not cover larger emergency expenses
Requires an active checking account — unbanked consumers cannot access payday loan products
Title loans risk vehicle repossession if the borrower cannot repay
Closed Sundays with limited Saturday hours (closes 4pm), reducing accessibility on weekends
best_for: Employed consumers with a checking account facing a small, unexpected expense before their next paycheck
People who need cash the same day and have already been declined by banks or credit unions
Borrowers who also need check cashing or bill payment and want to handle multiple financial tasks in one stop
Vehicle owners who need more than the $600 payday loan cap and have a clear title to borrow against
diagnosis: Check Into Cash is best for employed consumers with an active bank account who face a small, urgent cash shortfall and need same-day funds without a credit check. The main caveat is cost: payday and title loan fees translate to extremely high APRs, making these products suitable only for genuine short-term emergencies — not recurring cash flow gaps.
services: Same-day cash disbursement for approved applicants
meta_description: Check Into Cash at 5720 N Antioch Rd, Gladstone, MO. Same-day payday and title loans with convenient hours.
